settings.block_des: Mini Home Wax Warmer Kit, 2 lbs. Ipanema Hard Wax, Various Applicators, Nitrile Gloves

settings.block_content:
I purchased a variety of the bombshell sheet masks the caviar hyaluronic acid and Jasmine are my personal favorites but I also love the way the chocolate one works for my children for ages 11, 13, 16 and 22. It's safe enough on their faces and does not cause any irritation when I just apply some of the serum I'm excited to try some new ones I purchased like the passion fruit, and rapid recovery. My beautiful esthetician has used these on me for years. And now I'm hooked thank you for making a great affordable products.
★★★★★

This was my first time doing my own waxing and this product was highly rated online. I was pleasantly surprised. This wax heated up quickly, was easy to use and never broke while pulling. The product came with full instructions with QR codes for those who prefer online reading. I live in Hawaii and the goods were received quickly with fair and reasonable shipping cost. I am very happy with the product and will be back for more.
★★★★★

This is the wax I buy. This is the wax I will continue to buy. There is no reason to look anywhere else for hard wax.
★★★★★

Great product, exactly what I needed. After trying different brands of wax, this is by far my favorite! Returning customer

settings.heading: Why Choose Bombshell?
settings.feature_1_desc: Perfect for face, body, and brazilian services. Won't Break
settings.feature_2_desc: For him, for her, for every body. From hypoallergenic to pro-grade supplies
settings.feature_3_desc: Fast. Friendly with a pulse. We serve like we’d want to be served.
settings.feature_4_desc: Sustainably sourced wax. Community focused, charitable foot forward.

settings.heading: The Bombshell Difference
settings.subheading:
Bombshell Wax is the go-to choice for those who value high-quality wax, fast shipping, and genuine customer care. Every order comes with our personal touch because we truly appreciate you choosing us. (Replaced that line into about us for this one: If you’ve spotted his signature on your box or read our 5-star reviews, you already know: we genuinely care.)

When you call, you’re talking to us - right here in our wax office. No big corporations, no automated nonsense. Just a family business that cares, ready to help however we can.

settings.heading: The Bombshell Difference
settings.subheading:
Bombshell Wax is the go-to choice for those who value high-quality wax, fast shipping, and genuine customer care. Every order comes with our personal touch because we truly appreciate you choosing us.

When you call, you’re talking to us—right here in our wax office. No big corporations, no automated nonsense. Just a family business that cares, ready to help however we can.

settings.sub_heading: We provide for the waxers of all salon and spa types. Whether you're solo owner, in the salon suite, or running multiple large scale locations, we've got you covered. Discounts increase with order weight!

settings.block_des:
Our beeswax is sourced through Wild Survivors, a non-profit organization dedicated to empowering women and addressing the urgent issue of elephant poaching in Africa.

Their beekeepers practice ethical, environmentally friendly beekeeping methods that promote more than just healthy wild bee populations:

settings.mini_des:
Beekeping with a light touch
Bombshell ethically sources wax from wild, free to roam bees. No antibiotics, no pesticides.

Saving the elephants
Sustainable beekeeping creates a physical barrier to prevent human-elephant conflict.

settings.mini_des_right:
Enabling communities to thrive
Supporting female African groups, directly leading to increased education and changed gender perceptions.

Creating a healthy planet
Tap to learn more about how we and our partners help contribute to a healthy ecosystem.
